sentences.arabic: تَحْضِيرُ الْقَهْوَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ هُوَ طَقْسٌ دَقِيقٌ يَبْدَأُ بِتَحْمِيصِ حُبُوبِ الْبُنِّ الْخَضْرَاءِ حَتَّى تُصْبِحَ ذَهَبِيَّةَ اللَّوْنِ.
sentences.translation: Priprema arapske kafe je precizan ritual koji počinje prženjem zelenih zrna kafe dok ne postanu zlatne boje.
sentences.translationEn: Preparing Arabic coffee is a meticulous ritual that begins with roasting green coffee beans until they become golden in color.

sentences.arabic: تُنَكَّهُ الْقَهْوَةُ بِالْهَيْلِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ، ثُمَّ تُقَدَّمُ فِي فَنَاجِينَ صَغِيرَةٍ لَا مَقَابِضَ لَهَا تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ التَّرْحِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Kafa se aromatizira kardamomom i šafranom, a zatim poslužuje u malim šoljicama bez drški kao izraz dobrodošlice.
sentences.translationEn: The coffee is flavored with cardamom and saffron, then served in small handleless cups as an expression of welcome.

sentences.arabic: هُنَاكَ آدَابٌ خَاصَّةٌ لِلتَّقْدِيمِ، حَيْثُ يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُضِيفِ إِمْسَاكُ الدَّلَّةِ بِالْيَدِ الْيُسْرَى وَتَقْدِيمُ الْفِنْجَانِ بِالْيُمْنَى.
sentences.translation: Postoje posebna pravila ponašanja pri posluživanju, gdje domaćin mora držati džezvu (dallu) u lijevoj ruci, a šoljicu nuditi desnom.
sentences.translationEn: There is specific etiquette for serving, where the host must hold the pot (dallah) in the left hand and offer the cup with the right.

sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ مِنَ اللَّبَاقَةِ أَنْ يَقْبَلَ الضَّيْفُ فِنْجَانًا وَاحِدًا عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ، وَيَهُزَّ الْفِنْجَانَ عِنْدَ الِاكْتِفَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Smatra se pristojnim da gost prihvati barem jednu šoljicu, a protrese je kada mu je dovoljno.
sentences.translationEn: It is considered polite for the guest to accept at least one cup, and shake the cup when they have had enough.

sentences.arabic: تَتَجَاوَزُ هَذِهِ الْعَادَةُ كَوْنَهَا مُجَرَّدَ مَشْرُوبٍ، لِتُصْبِحَ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا فِي الْمُجَالَسَاتِ الِاجْتِمَاعِيَّةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj prevazilazi to što je samo piće, postajući osnovni stub arapskih društvenih okupljanja.
sentences.translationEn: This custom goes beyond being just a drink, becoming a fundamental pillar of Arab social gatherings.
